papers.title: Facility Location Game with Envy Ratio
papers.titleZh: 基于嫉妒比的设施选址博弈
papers.abstract: We study the one-facility location game on a real line with a new objective called envy ratio. The envy ratio, which is adopted from fair division and represents the egalitarianism, is defined as the maximum over the ratios between any two agents' utilities. We are interested in strategyproof or group strategyproof mechanisms that can minimize the envy ratio objective. We consider the model in two settings that can capture natural scenarios: the facility location and all the agents' locations are restricted on a fixed interval; every agent's location can be any point on the real line but the facility location is restricted on a relative interval. In both settings, we obtain the optimal solution and the best deterministic strategyproof mechanism which is also group strategyproof. In the first setting, we provide a lower bound for randomized strategyproof mechanisms. In the second setting, we give a lower bound and two upper bounds for randomized strategyproof mechanisms.

summarySections.backgroundAndQuestion: 为什么在设施选址中要考虑嫉妒比？传统机制设计关注总成本或最大成本，但可能忽略个体间的相对不公平。本文从公平分配理论引入‘嫉妒比’作为公平性指标，衡量任意两人效用比率的最大值，旨在捕捉更精细的平等关切。该问题处于无货币近似机制设计的研究脉络中，填补了以嫉妒比为目标函数的研究空白。
summarySections.modelAndSetup: 作者研究实数线上单设施选址问题，每个代理人报告位置，设施位置由机制决定。成本为距离，效用为边界减去成本。嫉妒比定义为所有代理人效用比的最大值，目标是最小化该比值。考虑两种设定：一是所有人和设施被限制在固定区间；二是代理人在实线上，但设施必须落在与报告位置相关的伸缩区间内。
summarySections.contributionsAndResults: 论文首次将嫉妒比引入设施选址机制设计，并分别在两种地理约束下取得紧确界结果。对于固定区间，最优确定性策略证明机制的近似比为2，随机机制下给出1.0314的下界。对于相对区间，确定性机制的最佳近似比为1+1/β，随机机制下提供上下界，其中当β≥1时存在优于通用构造的机制，揭示了参数对公平与激励兼容权衡的影响。
summarySections.methodsAndTechniques: 作者通过构造极端实例证明下界，利用单调性和对称性分析最优解位于中点。对于机制设计，采用混合最优解与端点的随机化策略，结合三角不等式和概率分布分解来分析期望嫉妒比。关键技术在于利用策略证明性约束推导成本下界，并通过分段概率估计建立近似比的紧致分析。
summarySections.limitationsAndReadingValue: 论文局限在于随机机制的上下界之间仍存间隙，尤其在相对区间设定下尚未找到最优随机机制。此外，机制依赖全局位置信息，实际部署需信任平台。最值得阅读的是其新颖的公平目标建模方式、对两类地理约束的系统对比，以及在经典框架中引入嫉妒比所揭示的新权衡，开放问题对后续研究具引导价值。

papers.title: Washed Out by the Crowd? Accountability under Sequential Review
papers.titleZh: 被群体淹没？顺序审查下的问责制
papers.abstract: When an early information producer is judged only after others have reviewed and revised the work, the same review that sharpens the final decision can blur the question of who deserves the credit. This paper asks how an organization can still reward careful early work once a chain of later reviewers has acted on it. In the model, an analyst's hidden effort makes an initial report more likely to be right; a sequence of reviewers then reacts to it; and the organization can pay only on the record this process leaves behind. The main result splits the value of any such record into two parts: how much effort improved the first report, and how well the final record still indicates whether the first report was accurate. When later reviewers can overturn a flawed report, review improves decisions but washes the analyst's effort out of the final outcome; therefore, rewarding the final outcome stops working, while rewarding agreement between the first and last word has incentive value instead. When the first report is simply copied by downstream reviewers, the reverse holds. Which reward is better comes down to one thing: how likely the review process is to repair an initial mistake.

summarySections.backgroundAndQuestion: 当最初的报告者付出努力完成初步判断后，后续层层审查可能修正错误，但也模糊了谁该为正确决策负责。这导致组织难以通过最终结果奖励早期贡献者，因为审查过程既提升了决策质量，又‘洗去’了初始努力的痕迹。论文关注的核心问题是：在顺序审查结构下，组织应如何设计激励机制，才能有效识别并奖励高质量的早期信息生产。
summarySections.modelAndSetup: 模型设定一名分析师首先投入不可观测的努力生成初始报告，随后一系列贝叶斯理性审查者依次更新并修改报告。组织只能基于最终可验证的记录（如最终决策是否正确，或首尾报告是否一致）来支付报酬。关键设定是审查者的策略固定于高努力信念下，且下游行为不直接依赖分析师的真实努力水平，从而分离出努力对初始报告的影响。
summarySections.contributionsAndResults: 论文的核心发现是将任何下游记录的激励价值分解为两个要素：努力提升首次报告准确性的原始效应，以及该记录区分‘正确起点’与‘错误起点’历史路径的能力。特别地，当审查能有效修复错误时，奖励‘首尾一致’比奖励‘最终正确’更具激励效果；反之，若审查只是复制初报，则后者更优。这一结论由修复概率是否超过1/2决定。
summarySections.methodsAndTechniques: 作者通过构建一个二元状态、顺序贝叶斯学习的动态模型，利用总变差距离量化不同合同的激励能力，并借助分支分解法将记录的统计区分力解构为‘保存’与‘修复’两条路径的概率差异。关键技术在于比较隐藏低努力偏离与正常高努力路径下，合同信号的分布差异，并结合递归动力学分析长期趋势。
summarySections.limitationsAndReadingValue: 模型假设审查者策略外生且固定，忽略了审查激励内生化的可能性；同时聚焦于线性审查链，未拓展至网络结构。尽管如此，论文提供了理解信息级联中责任归属问题的清晰框架，其关于绩效指标选择的反直觉洞见、严谨的分解方法及对组织档案实践的启示，使其在激励理论与信息设计领域极具阅读价值。

papers.title: Congestion-Based Slot Pricing in a Railway Auction Game
papers.titleZh: 基于拥堵的铁路拍卖游戏中的时隙定价
papers.abstract: We present a multi-agent system for studying the allocation of discrete, congested resources among heterogeneous strategic agents, motivated by the problem of railway slot allocation under deregulation. Multiple operator-agents, differing in size and capacity, interact through a shared auction mechanism over repeated rounds under time-constrained decision-making. The mechanism combines a congestion-based base price that increases with aggregate demand with an asymmetric corrective adjustment that penalises the agent requesting the most slots and rewards the agent requesting the fewest, and is designed to mitigate strategic dominance by large agents while preserving transparency and congestion sensitivity. We formulate the interaction as a repeated game with incomplete information and implement the system as a real-time, web-based multi-agent environment in which human participants control individual agents and observe live marginal-cost and competitor feedback. We report exploratory observations from two structured sessions with domain experts acting as operator-agents. The congestion mechanism responds to aggregate demand as designed and the corrective incentives are actively triggered, but agents representing large operators persist with high-request strategies despite the penalty, suggesting that corrective pricing is necessary but not sufficient to neutralise strategic dominance in this multi-agent setting. A post-session debrief indicates that participants' decisions were driven by the assumed agent role rather than personal disposition, and provides qualitative support for strategic motives, such as preserving market presence and raising rivals' costs, operating alongside short-term profit maximisation. We discuss implications for multi-agent mechanism design under asymmetric budgets and outline directions for analytical validation and larger-scale multi-agent experiments.

summarySections.backgroundAndQuestion: 为什么传统拍卖机制可能加剧铁路时隙分配中的不平等？本文关注 deregulation 后铁路基础设施公有但运营商私有的背景下，大型运营商凭借资金优势通过过度竞价排挤小运营商的问题。现有拥堵定价虽能反映资源紧张，但无法阻止战略主导行为，因此需要设计能主动抑制强势玩家滥用市场地位的新机制。
summarySections.modelAndSetup: 作者如何模拟多运营商竞争稀缺时隙的情境？模型设定多个异质运营商作为智能体，在重复进行的拍卖轮次中决定申请多少时隙。价格由全网总需求决定，并引入非对称奖惩机制：申请最多者受罚，最少者获益。参与者在时间压力下决策，系统实时反馈成本与竞争对手行为，构成一个不完全信息下的重复博弈环境。
summarySections.contributionsAndResults: 论文发现的核心机制效果是什么？实验证明拥堵定价能有效响应总体需求，奖惩机制也被频繁触发，小运营商倾向于保守策略并受益于折扣。但大型运营商持续采用高请求策略，即便亏损也维持市场存在感，表明奖惩虽必要却不足以消除战略主导。这揭示了现实动机如‘抬高对手成本’在决策中的重要作用。
summarySections.methodsAndTechniques: 作者如何验证机制的有效性？采用基于网页的多人实时游戏平台，邀请铁路领域专家扮演不同规模运营商进行受控实验。通过记录每轮决策与财务结果，结合事后访谈，分析行为模式与战略动因。该方法融合了机制仿真与人类行为观察，弥补纯理论模型在预测真实策略互动上的不足。
summarySections.limitationsAndReadingValue: 该研究的主要局限在于样本规模较小且未操纵变量，结论属探索性而非统计验证。机制依赖人为执行与角色代入，难以推广至全自动系统。但其价值在于将奖惩机制嵌入动态拍卖的设计思路，以及通过游戏化实验捕捉战略动机的方法，对设计兼顾效率与公平的公共资源分配机制具有启发意义。

papers.title: Constrained Distributed Heterogeneous Two-Facility Location Problems with Max-Variant Cost
papers.titleZh: 带最大变体成本的受限分布式异构双设施选址问题
papers.abstract: This paper investigates a constrained distributed heterogeneous two-facility location problem under the max-variant cost model. In this setting, a set of agents with private locations on the real line is partitioned into disjoint groups. The constraint stipulates that facilities must be situated within a given multiset of candidate locations, with the restriction that each candidate location can host at most one facility. Under the max-variant model, an agent's individual cost is defined as the distance from their location to the farthest facility. Our objective is to design strategyproof distributed mechanisms that incentivize agents to report their locations truthfully while approximating social objectives. Such mechanisms operate in two stages: first, for each group, a pair of candidate locations is selected as representatives based solely on local reports; subsequently, the mechanism outputs two final facility locations from the set of all representatives. We focus on a class of deterministic strategyproof distributed mechanisms and establish constant lower and upper bounds on the distortion under four social objectives: Average-of-Average, Max-of-Max, Average-of-Max, and Max-of-Average costs.

summarySections.backgroundAndQuestion: 为什么在分布式环境下设计激励相容的设施选址机制如此困难？传统机制设计通常假设中央机构能获取全局信息，但在现实中，决策常分层进行：各小组先本地提名代表，再由高层统一决策。这种结构限制了信息流通，同时个体可能谎报位置以降低自身成本。本文聚焦于一个更贴近现实的场景：设施只能建在预设候选点上，且每个点最多容纳一个设施，进一步增加了约束下的优化难度。
summarySections.modelAndSetup: 作者构建了一个两阶段分布式机制模型：n个位于实线上的代理被划分为k个互不相交的组，每个代理需使用两个异构设施，其个体成本为到较远设施的距离（max-variant cost）。机制首先基于每组内部报告选出两个候选代表位置，第二阶段仅利用这些代表信息决定最终设施部署。整个过程受制于候选位置容量限制，并要求机制具备策略防操控性。
summarySections.contributionsAndResults: 论文的核心贡献是针对四种社会目标——平均-平均、最大-最大、最大-平均和平均-最大成本——分别建立了策略防操控分布式机制的失真度常数上下界。特别是，对于最大-平均和平均-最大这类体现群体间公平性的目标，首次给出了接近紧确的失真界限，揭示了即使在强约束下，仍可通过合理机制设计控制效率损失。
summarySections.methodsAndTechniques: 作者通过构造一类参数化的(a, β)-分位数机制来实现上界分析，其关键在于巧妙选取每组的代表性候选位置并设计聚合规则。下界则采用反证法，构造一系列极端实例迫使任何策略防操控机制在某些情况下产生高失真。证明中反复运用三角不等式与群组规模占比分析，将几何距离关系转化为成本比值估计。
summarySections.limitationsAndReadingValue: 尽管模型刻画了丰富的现实约束，但结果局限于实直线与双设施情形，扩展至一般度量空间或多设施更具挑战。机制依赖于特定的两阶段代表选择结构，实际部署需协调局部自主性与全局一致性。最值得阅读的是其对‘分布式’与‘受限选址’双重挑战的整合建模方式，以及对公平导向社会目标的精细失真分析，为后续研究提供了清晰的技术路径。

papers.title: Endogenous shareholding auctions
papers.abstract: We introduce endogenous shareholding auctions for production economies where a monopolist must elicit consumer demand in order to determine price and quantity. Each of these auctions has the property that the auction's profit is distributed across the monopolist and the consumers in accordance with ownership shares that are determined over the course of the auction. We characterize this class, and a larger class, on the basis of standard axioms. Finally, we investigate optimal auctions according to both prior-free domination and subjective expected welfare.

summarySections.backgroundAndQuestion: 传统垄断监管面临需求信息缺失的难题，而现有拍卖机制常因效率、公平与激励相容难以兼顾而受限。本文关注一种特殊情境：监管者与垄断者拥有相同的技术成本信息，但均不了解消费者需求。在此背景下，如何设计既高效、公平又激励相容的拍卖机制，成为核心问题。
summarySections.modelAndSetup: 模型设定一个生产型垄断者和若干单位需求消费者，成本曲线已知但需求私有。机制需满足效率、策略免疫（truthful bidding）和无妒忌（no envy）三个硬性约束。通过引入所有权份额的内生分配，将拍卖利润在参与者间重新分配，从而构建出新的机制类别。
summarySections.contributionsAndResults: 论文刻画了一类‘内生补贴拍卖’，并进一步筛选出满足个体理性（自愿参与）的子类——‘内生持股拍卖’，后者对应于竞争均衡下的所有权再分配。特别地，作者提出‘瓣膜拍卖’作为消费者最优机制，揭示了利润分配与价格路径之间的结构性联系。
summarySections.methodsAndTechniques: 证明依赖于对选项集（option set）和预算集的精细分析，结合格点结构与补贴曲线的连续性条件。关键技术是‘不变性引理’，它表明在无妒忌条件下，消费者的补贴仅取决于其同伴决定的格罗夫斯价格，而非具体报价组合。
summarySections.limitationsAndReadingValue: 模型假设偏好准线性且单位需求，限制了向更复杂需求场景的推广。机制依赖精确的补贴曲线设计，实际部署可能面临计算与解释性挑战。但其对公平与激励兼容性的深层整合，为监管机制设计提供了新颖视角，值得深入研读其核心定理与构造逻辑。

papers.title: Episodic-to-Semantic Consolidation Without Identity Drift
papers.abstract: Long-running adaptive intelligent agents face a structural tension between knowledge consolidation and information integrity. Memory consolidation is conventionally treated as an agent-changing operation: a model is fine-tuned, a prompt rewritten, a policy distilled, or a reflection appended to the context that governs future behaviour. In regulated autonomic deployment this is a liability because the agent operates under commitments and audit contracts that bind to a specific, cryptographically certified identity. We propose to treat consolidation not as a mutation of the planner or the identity manifest, but as a deterministic function f: M^ep -> M^sem over episodic memory whose output is a separately addressable semantic knowledge layer; the identity hash does not read M^sem, so consolidation updates knowledge without changing the agent's certified identity. We give a formal account of the agent representation, prove identity invariance through a structural lemma on the manifest's hash-input set, specify a deterministic aggregation algorithm whose outputs are auditable database rows with explicit confidence and supporting-event provenance, and validate the construction with synthetic experiments demonstrating per-field correctness, byte-equal identity across consolidation passes, and a mean 79.82% reduction in unproductive planner attempts (95% BCa CI [78.02%, 81.49%] across 10 seeds) against a calibrated Bayesian-shrunk baseline. The construction is a knowledge-update discipline for autonomic agents in which lessons accumulate as queryable facts while the agent's certified identity remains byte-equal across its operational lifetime, with an embodied service agent as the running case study.

summarySections.backgroundAndQuestion: 长期运行的自适应智能体面临知识积累与身份一致性的矛盾。传统方法通过微调模型或改写提示来固化经验，但这会改变其加密认证的身份，导致每次更新都需要重新审计。本文针对受监管环境中的具身服务代理，提出一个核心问题：能否在不改变代理身份的前提下，实现从事件记忆到语义知识的有效提炼？
summarySections.modelAndSetup: 论文设定代理状态由三部分构成：不可变的身份清单、追加式的事件日志和可更新的语义知识层。输入是持续产生的结构化交互事件，输出是由确定性聚合函数生成的语义事实行。评估方式包括形式化证明身份哈希不变性、回归测试字节一致性，以及在合成决策任务上对比不同基线的无效尝试减少率。
summarySections.contributionsAndResults: 主要贡献是一种身份稳定的记忆巩固机制，使代理能在保持认证身份完全不变的同时，积累可查询的操作知识。实验证明该方法在合成任务中比无记忆基线平均减少79.8%的无效尝试，且身份哈希在多次合并后仍字节相等。这表明知识更新与身份绑定可以解耦，为合规部署提供了可行路径。
summarySections.methodsAndTechniques: 方法核心是将知识整合定义为从事件日志M到独立语义层Mcm的确定性函数f，且该层不在身份哈希的输入集中。通过结构化引理证明任何仅写入Mcm的操作都不会影响身份哈希。算法采用类似SQL的聚合规则生成带置信度和溯源信息的事实，并通过只读接口供规划器使用，确保知识流动不破坏完整性。
summarySections.limitationsAndReadingValue: 局限在于当前版本仅处理结构化字段的统计归纳，无法进行语言级抽象，也未建模遗忘或时间衰减。结论依赖于可信事件源假设，对抗性攻击未被防御。最值得读的是其机制设计思想——如何通过架构分离实现学习而不漂移身份，这对高可靠性自主系统的构建具有指导意义。

papers.title: Actuator Reality Shaping for Zero-Shot Sim-to-Real Robot Learning
papers.titleZh: 用于零样本仿真到现实机器人学习的执行器现实塑造
papers.abstract: Sim-to-real transfer in robot learning is often limited by discrepancies between the ideal actuator dynamics assumed during policy training and the nonlinear, hardware-dependent behavior of physical motors. While conventional approaches attempt to bridge this gap by increasing simulator fidelity through system identification, domain randomization, or learned actuator models, we introduce an alternative paradigm: actuator reality shaping. Instead of modifying the simulator to match the real world, our method shapes the closed-loop behavior of physical actuators to match the idealized second-order reference dynamics used in simulation. By equipping each joint with a two-degree-of-freedom feedforward--feedback controller, we decouple reference-response shaping from robust stabilization, thereby providing a standardized actuator interface for reinforcement learning policies. As a result, policies trained only with the prescribed reference model can be deployed zero-shot on real hardware without task-level fine-tuning or learned actuator models. We validate the approach on a single-joint high-gear-ratio servo under external loads and a 7-DOF robotic arm reaching task, where actuator reality shaping substantially reduces sim-to-real tracking error and improves zero-shot task performance compared with standard servo-control and representative real-to-sim-to-real baselines. We further demonstrate zero-shot transfer on a wheeled-legged robot driving over a slope and a humanoid robot walking, suggesting that actuator reality shaping can serve as a reusable interface for robot learning across diverse hardware platforms.

summarySections.backgroundAndQuestion: 仿真到现实迁移在机器人强化学习中常因真实电机与仿真理想动力学之间的差异而失败。传统方法通过调整仿真器来逼近硬件行为，依赖大量系统辨识或域随机化，导致策略泛化性差且需重复采集数据。本文指出问题核心在于执行器层面的非线性特性如摩擦、回差和延迟无法被简单建模，因而提出从相反方向解决：不改变仿真，而是改造硬件控制器使其表现得像仿真中的理想模型。
summarySections.modelAndSetup: 研究设定为在仿真中训练策略时假设关节由理想二阶PD动力学驱动，而在真实机器人上部署时，每个关节配备一个低层级的两自由度（2-DoF）控制器。输入是策略输出的目标角度，输出是实际关节响应。评价方式是在单关节跟踪、机械臂到达、轮腿机器人爬坡和人形机器人行走等任务中，比较不同方法下的轨迹跟踪误差与任务成功率，重点验证是否无需微调即可实现零样本部署。
summarySections.contributionsAndResults: 论文提出了‘执行器现实塑造’的新范式，通过标准化物理执行器的闭环行为来匹配仿真模型。实验显示，在高减速比伺服系统上，该方法相较工厂PID控制器和学习型基线显著降低跟踪误差，零样本部署下机械臂末端位置误差减少96.5%。结果表明，策略可在完全不接触真实数据的情况下直接迁移到多种平台，包括动态行走的人形机器人，验证了接口级标准化的有效性。
summarySections.methodsAndTechniques: 方法核心是每关节配置一个两自由度控制器，包含前馈路径以复现仿真中的参考动力学，以及反馈路径抑制扰动。结合扰动观测器（DOB）进一步补偿摩擦、外部负载等未知力矩。前馈设计独立于反馈，使理想动态得以精确复现，而反馈保障稳定性与抗干扰能力。整个驱动层如同设备驱动程序，屏蔽硬件细节，使高层策略始终面对一致的动力学接口。
summarySections.limitationsAndReadingValue: 局限在于假设关节惯量恒定，难以适用于准直驱系统中随构型变化的惯量；同时仍需粗略的电机参数估计，对强非线性硬件的扩展性未充分验证。尽管如此，论文的价值在于提供了一种可复用的硬件抽象思路。最值得读的是其系统设计理念与在多形态机器人上的零样本演示，展示了从控制理论到跨平台机器人学习的桥梁潜力。

papers.title: Embodied.cpp: A Portable Inference Runtime of Embodied AI Models on Heterogeneous Robots
papers.titleZh: Embodied.cpp: 面向异构机器人的一体化AI模型便携式推理运行时
papers.abstract: Embodied AI models now span vision-language-action (VLA) models and world-action models (WAMs), but practical deployment remains fragmented across model-specific Python stacks, backend assumptions, and robot-side glue code, especially on heterogeneous edge devices. Existing inference runtimes are designed mainly for request-response serving and therefore do not satisfy the runtime contract of embodied deployment: multi-rate execution inside closed-loop control, latency-first batch-1 inference on heterogeneous hardware, and extensible embodied interfaces beyond fixed token I/O. We present Embodied.cpp, a portable C++ inference runtime for embodied models. Based on an architectural analysis of representative VLA models and WAMs, Embodied.cpp captures a shared execution path and organizes it into five layers: input adapters, sequence builders, backbone execution, head plugins, and deployment adapters. The runtime provides modular multi-rate execution, latency-first fused inference, and extensible operator and I/O support, enabling deployment across heterogeneous devices, robots, and simulators through one backend abstraction. We evaluate Embodied.cpp on two VLA models, HY-VLA and pi0.5, and on a preliminary WAM benchmark using a LingBot-VA Transformer block. The VLA deployments achieve successful closed-loop execution with 100.0% and 91.0% task success rates, respectively. The WAM benchmark reduces block memory from 312.2 MiB to 88.1 MiB. These results show that Embodied.cpp improves deployment efficiency while preserving high accuracy across diverse embodied model architectures.

summarySections.backgroundAndQuestion: 当前具身AI模型（如视觉-语言-动作模型和世界-动作模型）虽能力强大，但在真实机器人上的部署仍高度碎片化，依赖特定Python栈和大量胶水代码。传统推理系统面向吞吐量优化的请求响应模式，无法满足具身系统对低延迟、闭环控制和多速率执行的需求。论文旨在解决如何在一个统一、轻量的运行时中支持多样化模型在资源受限边缘设备上的高效部署问题。
summarySections.modelAndSetup: 论文研究的是具身模型在异构硬件（如Jetson、x86）上的端到端推理部署问题。输入为传感器流（图像、指令等），输出为动作或预测未来状态。系统不涉及训练，而是通过C++运行时加载预训练模型，在仿真和真实机器人环境中进行闭环执行测试。评估指标包括任务成功率、推理延迟、内存占用及输出一致性，实验覆盖两种VLA模型和一个WAM组件的微基准。
summarySections.contributionsAndResults: 论文提出了Embodied.cpp，一个专为具身AI设计的便携式C++推理运行时，其核心贡献在于统一的五层架构，支持跨模型家族和硬件平台的部署。在两个VLA模型上实现了接近100%的任务成功率，同时在WAM组件上将内存占用从312MiB降至88MiB且输出高度一致。结果表明，该系统能在保持高精度的同时显著提升部署效率，验证了共享执行路径的可行性。
summarySections.methodsAndTechniques: 方法基于对多种具身模型的架构分析，提炼出共享执行路径，并将其解耦为五个可插拔层次：输入适配器、序列构建器、骨干执行、头插件和部署适配器。关键技术包括模块化的多速率执行调度、面向低延迟的小批量融合推理，以及可扩展的操作符和I/O接口。这种设计使不同组件可独立更新和优化，无需重构整个系统，从而应对模型演进和硬件多样性。
summarySections.limitationsAndReadingValue: 论文的WAM评估仅基于单个Transformer块的微基准，缺乏完整的闭环任务验证，对复杂预测-行动协同的支持尚待证明。此外，系统优势依赖于模型能适配其架构，对完全非标准结构的兼容性未充分展示。尽管如此，其问题设定和系统设计极具价值，特别是对关注实际部署、边缘计算和具身智能工程落地的研究者和工程师而言，是理解如何桥接先进模型与真实机器人系统的重要参考。

papers.title: Learning to Move Before Learning to Do: Task-Agnostic pretraining for VLAs
papers.titleZh: 先学会移动，再学会做事：面向视觉-语言-动作模型的无任务预训练
papers.abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models are fundamentally bottlenecked by the scarcity of expert demonstrations -- triplets of observations, instructions, and actions that are costly to collect at scale. We argue that this bottleneck stems from conflating two distinct learning objectives: acquiring physical competence (how to move) and acquiring semantic alignment (what to do). Crucially, only the latter requires language supervision. Building on this Decomposition Hypothesis, we propose Task-Agnostic Pretraining (TAP), a two-stage framework that first learns transferable motor priors from cheap, unlabeled interaction data -- including discarded off-task trajectories and autonomous robot play -- via a self-supervised Inverse Dynamics objective. A lightweight second stage then grounds these priors in language using minimal expert data. On the SIMPLER benchmark, TAP matches models trained on over 1M expert trajectories while using orders of magnitude less labeled data, yielding a 10% absolute gain over standard behavior cloning. On a real-world WidowX platform, TAP retains 25% success under camera perturbations where internet-scale baselines collapse to 0%, demonstrating that task-agnostic pretraining produces robust, transferable physical representations and offers a scalable path forward for Embodied AI.

summarySections.backgroundAndQuestion: 当前视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型依赖大量专家示范数据，这类数据昂贵且难以扩展。核心问题在于将‘如何移动’的物理能力学习与‘做什么’的语义理解混为一谈。本文指出，前者无需语言监督，可通过无任务交互数据习得，从而打破数据瓶颈，推动具身智能更高效的发展。
summarySections.modelAndSetup: 模型输入为图像观测对，通过逆向动力学预测动作，实现无监督预训练；随后在少量带语言指令的专家数据上微调以完成任务。实验在SIMPLER仿真基准和真实WidowX机械臂上进行，评估任务成功率，并测试在扰动环境下的鲁棒性，验证方法的有效性与泛化能力。
summarySections.contributionsAndResults: 提出任务无关预训练（TAP）框架，在仅用极小量标注数据下，性能媲美百万级专家轨迹训练的模型，并在仿真中取得10%绝对增益。真实世界实验显示其在相机视角偏移等扰动下仍保持25%以上成功率，远超基线，证明物理先验的有效性和强鲁棒性。
summarySections.methodsAndTechniques: 方法分为两阶段：第一阶段利用废弃的非任务轨迹或自主随机探索数据，通过自监督逆向动力学目标学习通用运动先验，使模型关注动态变化而非静态背景；第二阶段用少量语言标注数据对齐动作与指令。该机制解耦了物理能力和语义理解的学习过程。
summarySections.limitationsAndReadingValue: 尽管结果显著，但错误分析表明语义层面的推理仍是瓶颈，且真实实验依赖特定采集流程。读者应重点关注其问题分解思路、两阶段框架设计及对数据效率与鲁棒性的实证分析，这对构建低成本、高适应性的具身智能系统具有重要启发价值。

papers.title: VLA-Corrector: Lightweight Detect-and-Correct Inference for Adaptive Action Horizon
papers.titleZh: VLA-Corrector: 面向自适应动作视界的轻量级检测与纠正推理
papers.abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) foundation models have recently achieved strong progress in embodied intelligence. To reduce policy-call frequency while preserving temporal coherence, most generative policies adopt an action chunk mechanism, executing multiple future actions in an open-loop manner under a fixed action horizon. However, this "predict-then-blindly-execute" paradigm sacrifices closed-loop reactivity: in contact-rich physical interactions, even small local perturbations can rapidly amplify within the open-loop blind spot, leading to compounding errors and ultimately task failure. To address this limitation, we propose VLA-Corrector, a lightweight corrective inference framework for action-chunked VLA policies. Without modifying the backbone policy weights, VLA-Corrector introduces a lightweight Latent-space Vision Monitor (LVM) that continuously compares predicted and actual visual feature evolution, enabling online detection of visual dynamics deviations. Once persistent deviation is detected, the system triggers a truncation event, discards the remaining stale actions, and invokes corrective replanning via Online Gradient Guidance (OGG). The detect-and-correct mechanism of VLA-Corrector naturally induces an event-triggered adaptive action horizon: it preserves long-horizon execution when the current chunk remains reliable, and invokes short-horizon corrective replanning when execution begins to drift. In doing so, VLA-Corrector mitigates the trade-off imposed by static horizons between execution robustness and policy-call frequency. It can be integrated into different VLA models without further retraining the VLA backbone, interrupting compounding errors while preserving much of the efficiency benefit of action chunking and substantially improving robustness in long-horizon, contact-rich robotic manipulation tasks.

summarySections.backgroundAndQuestion: 现有视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型在执行长视界动作块时存在开环盲区，一旦出现微小扰动会因无法及时响应而导致误差累积和任务失败。虽然动作块机制降低了策略调用频率并提升了平滑性，却牺牲了闭环反应能力。本文旨在解决固定动作视界带来的效率与鲁棒性之间的根本权衡问题。
summarySections.modelAndSetup: 研究基于标准VLA策略，在不修改主干网络的前提下引入一个轻量级外部模块。输入为实时视觉观测与当前动作，系统通过隐空间视觉监控器持续比对预测与实际的视觉演化差异，并在检测到持续偏离时触发截断与重规划。实验在MetaWorld、LIBERO及真实机器人平台上评估成功率与策略调用效率。
summarySections.contributionsAndResults: 论文提出了VLA-Corrector框架，实现了无需重训练即可提升多种VLA模型的鲁棒性。结果显示其在不同骨干模型上均显著提高任务成功率，尤其在高难度与干扰场景下增益明显，同时降低无效策略调用，提升了每次推理的成功率效率。这表明自适应动作视界优于静态设定。
summarySections.methodsAndTechniques: 核心是检测与纠正双机制：隐空间视觉监控器（LVM）利用轻量MLP预测短期视觉残差变化，通过余弦相似度衡量实际与预期演化的不一致性；当偏差持续超过动态阈值时触发截断。随后启用在线梯度引导（OGG），利用历史正确方向注入修正梯度，指导重规划朝可恢复轨迹进行。
summarySections.limitationsAndReadingValue: 方法依赖于冻结的VLA特征表达，若主干模型本身缺乏恢复潜力，则纠正效果受限。此外，OGG仅在中断后单次调用，适用范围集中于接触密集、易漂移的操作任务。最值得阅读的是其事件触发机制设计与真实世界扰动恢复案例，展示了高效、低侵入式增强现有VLA系统的可行性。
